form.name: IMB_MV_Form_BookDemo_RealPeople
form.introHeadline: Meet Real MedVirtual Talent for Your Practice
form.introBody: MedVirtual helps practices hire dedicated full-time virtual staff who become part of your team — for calls, scheduling, insurance verification, intake, and admin support.
form.thankYouBody: A MedVirtual team member will follow up so you can review candidates and request interviews.
form.routingQuestion: Are you looking to hire staff for your medical practice?
form.routingYes: Yes, I want to hire staff
form.routingNo: No, I am looking for a job
form.reuseNote: Create as a new form (or duplicate FirstBatch form and rename). Keep hiring routing + SMS + privacy + booking link.

creatives.headline: THE ADMIN WORK DOESN’T STOP.
creatives.primaryText:
Calls keep coming. Tasks keep stacking. Your team is already stretched.

Meet Jessica — a Jr. Medical Admin available through MedVirtual. Hire a dedicated full-time virtual staff member who works as part of your practice team.

Book a demo to request an interview.
creatives.primaryTextBackup: Too much admin and not enough day? Meet Jessica and hire dedicated virtual medical admin support through MedVirtual — not another generic staffing promise.
creatives.description: Meet real MedVirtual medical admin talent.
creatives.notes: Lead creative. Closest to the only FirstBatch signal (TooManyCalls / overloaded staff). Treatment C is a production draft — designer may polish; still uploadable now at 1080×1350.
creatives.dimensionsNote: Source images are 2965×2965 (1:1). Preview crops are padded 1080×1350. Designer must produce final 1080×1350 exports with approved on-image copy.

creatives.headline: YOUR FRONT DESK SHOULDN’T SPEND ALL DAY SCHEDULING.
creatives.primaryText:
Scheduling should not consume your entire front desk.

Meet Chelsea — a Dental Virtual Assistant available through MedVirtual. Add a dedicated full-time virtual teammate your practice can interview.

Book a demo to get started.

creatives.headline: YOUR FRONT DESK CAN’T DO EVERYTHING.
creatives.primaryText:
Patients are waiting. Phones are ringing. Follow-up is stacking up.

Meet Angelica — a Front Desk Assistant available through MedVirtual. Hire dedicated virtual staff who support your front-desk workflow as part of your practice team.

Book a demo to request an interview.

creatives.headline: HOW MUCH OF YOUR DAY GOES TO INSURANCE VERIFICATION?
creatives.primaryText:
Insurance verification can pull your team away from patients.

Meet Mark — an Insurance Verification Specialist available through MedVirtual. Hire a dedicated full-time virtual staff member for eligibility and verification support.

Book a demo to request an interview.
